svg.title: Banking Risk Analytics Methodology Flowchart
svg.desc: End-to-end methodology for the Banking Risk Analytics and Data Analysis project, showing 9 steps from problem understanding to business recommendations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about problem understanding in banking risk analytics')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about data collection from MySQL in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about data cleaning and preprocessing steps')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about feature engineering and income band segmentation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about exploratory data analysis techniques used')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the DAX risk scoring model in Power BI')

sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Power BI dashboards built for this project')
g.text: Power BI: Loan, Deposit, Risk KPIs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What were the key business recommendations from this project?')

g.text: Legend — click any step to explore further
